text:
On Sat, Mar 15, 2014 at 05:41:59PM +0200, Johannes Jost Meixner wrote:
> Looks good. Minor leftover: with the changed portname, you don't need to
> explicitly override DATADIR anymore, I've killed it in the patch attached.

Good catch! Thanks for double-checking and finding this!
Riggs
